title: SQLite repository adapter, schema bootstrap, and containerized integration tests
description: Implement infrastructure layer: SQLite access (maintained Node driver per brief), schema initialization/migrations, row-to-domain mappers, and concrete repository implementing the application port. Database path from SQLITE_PATH with injectable path for tests. Integration tests run only in isolated containers against real SQLite files/volumes; achieve 100% line coverage on projects/todo-reference/src/infrastructure/**/*.ts per coverage config. No UI or Server Actions in this task.
acceptance: All persistence I/O is confined to projects/todo-reference/src/infrastructure; application use cases are invoked only through public repository implementation or test harness, not from React.
Schema/bootstrap is repeatable and safe for fresh test databases in CI containers.
SQLITE_PATH is read from environment with documented defaults for local dev and explicit paths in container jobs.
Integration tests execute only via the containerized workflow defined in task 02; no bare-metal integration that leaks state.
Integration coverage report shows 100% line coverage for src/infrastructure/**/*.ts.
Dependency direction: infrastructure depends on application/domain interfaces, not the reverse.
